description: Vertical full-color candid photograph taken indoors in an office hallway (yellow walls, carpeted floor, fluorescent lighting, a recessed wall cabinet at left). A man in the center wears a dark graffiti or flame-print short-sleeve shirt (text fragments such as 'DRIP' visible) and blue jeans with bright green-and-black sneakers, his hands cuffed behind his back, being walked down the corridor. He is accompanied by two officers: at left a plainclothes officer in a dark cap, black t-shirt and tan trousers, and at right a uniformed law-enforcement officer (Florida Highway Patrol trooper) in a tan/khaki shirt and trousers with a duty belt, radio and holstered equipment, holding the man's arm. There is no on-image graphic text, headline, slogan, seal or logo overlay. Context from the tweet: USCIS states a person described as an illegal alien from Cuba was taken into custody at the Orlando office in coordination with ICE and Florida Highway Patrol.
notable_text: (no on-image text; detainee's shirt shows fragmentary print text such as 'DRIP')
